overview: I built richardthomchick.com in 4 phases: an Astro 5 + Tailwind CSS 4 static MVP, then added 3-tier search (Pagefind + Pinecone + Claude RAG), per-page AI actions (Summarize, Listen, Ask AI), and finally visual polish with evaluation infrastructure.

keyPoints.title: Astro 5 ships zero JS; React enables future dynamic features
Claude Code skill cut publishing from ~1 hour to one command
3-tier search: Pagefind, OpenAI+Pinecone, and Claude RAG simultaneously
Summarize uses build-time Anthropic API calls with deep-linked takeaways
Listen uses browser-native TTS with word-count scrubbing (~150 wpm)
